args.query:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(o.OwnerId),'#','') AS OwnerId,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(REPLACE(TRIM(c.CompanySignedDate),' ','') AS DATE) - CAST(REPLACE(TRIM(o.CreatedDate),' ','') AS DATE) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(TRIM(o.ContractID__c),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE CAST(REPLACE(TRIM(o.CreatedDate),' ','') AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(o.OwnerId),'#','') AS OwnerId,
       AVG(CAST(CAST(REPLACE(TRIM(c.CompanySignedDate),' ','') AS DATE) - CAST(REPLACE(TRIM(o.CreatedDate),' ','') AS DATE) AS DOUBLE)) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c
  ON REPLACE(TRIM(o.ContractID__c),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE CAST(REPLACE(TRIM(o.CreatedDate),' ','') AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
